heading: Duties of former Commissioner of Agriculture transferred to Secretary
label: 2205 Duties of former Commissioner of Agriculture transferred to Secretary
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized and directed to perform all the duties named in all Acts of Congress in force on , to be performed by the Commissioner of Agriculture.February 8, 1889
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 515 of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966

Transfer of FunctionsFunctions of all officers, agencies, and employees of Department of Agriculture transferred, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of Agriculture by 1953 Reorg. Plan No. 2, § 1, eff. , 18 F.R. 3219, , set out as a note under .June 4, 195367 Stat. 633section 2201 of this title
